'''bafopo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:loaner|loaner]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-f-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:loaner|loaner]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| bafopo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:bæfepeth|bæfepeth]] || [[word:bæfepej|bæfepej]] || [[word:bæfepesh|bæfepesh]] || [[word:bæfepe|bæfepe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:bafofopoth|bafofopoth]] || [[word:bafofopoj|bafofopoj]] || [[word:bafofoposh|bafofoposh]] || [[word:bafofopo|bafofopo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:bafopoth|bafopoth]] || [[word:bafopoj|bafopoj]] || [[word:bafoposh|bafoposh]] || [[word:bafopo|bafopo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:bafofpoth|bafofpoth]] || [[word:bafofpoj|bafofpoj]] || [[word:bafofposh|bafofposh]] || [[word:bafofpof|bafofpof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:bafopotho|bafopotho]] || [[word:bafopojo|bafopojo]] || [[word:bafoposho|bafoposho]] || [[word:bafopoko|bafopoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:bafopoth|bafopoth]] || [[word:bafopoj|bafopoj]] || [[word:bafoposh|bafoposh]] || [[word:bafopo|bafopo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:bafopothol|bafopothol]] || [[word:bafopojol|bafopojol]] || [[word:bafoposhol|bafoposhol]] || [[word:bafopokol|bafopokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:bafopothotho|bafopothotho]] || [[word:bafopojojo|bafopojojo]] || [[word:bafoposhosho|bafoposhosho]] || [[word:bafopoko|bafopoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:bafopothon|bafopothon]] || [[word:bafopojon|bafopojon]] || [[word:bafoposhon|bafoposhon]] || [[word:bafopokon|bafopokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:bafopothoro|bafopothoro]] || [[word:bafopojoro|bafopojoro]] || [[word:bafoposhoro|bafoposhoro]] || [[word:bafopokoro|bafopokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7296ca6}}
